case_title: MEZAN ASMELASH VS. GRACE JEWELRY LLC

docket_entries.description: REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASMELAH, MEZAN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GRACE JEWELRY LLC
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY ASMELAH, MEZAN AS TO DEFENDANT GRACE JEWELRY LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT GRACE JEWELRY LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY BAO LAI TANG, MEMBER MANAGER, WHO IS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER AIDONG NI. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED AUG-03-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GRACE JEWELRY LLC
